semantic_description: Scans an integer array of length n with pairwise distinct elements, initializes max1 and max2 from the first two entries, swaps them if needed, then runs a for loop from index 2 to n - 1 maintaining the largest and second largest values seen so far. The function returns the second largest array value, preserves the input IntArray memory unchanged, and requires n >= 2 so the initialization reads are in bounds.
